summary: Completed the ADR 0108 latest-main live apply by replaying Windmill from the current mainline, hardening the seed-sync and runtime-env durability path for the worker checkout, and verifying the full operator onboarding, inventory, and offboarding round-trip against the live Keycloak and OpenBao integrations.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest pytest -q tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_run_namespace.py tests/test_ansible_execution_scopes.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_operator_manager.py tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_ephemeral_lifecycle_repo_surfaces.py` passed with 52 tests, `python3 -m py_compile` passed for the touched Windmill and operator scripts, and both `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` and `make syntax-check-windmill` passed on the latest-main worktree.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully from the isolated integration worktree with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=203 changed=37 unreachable=0 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=63 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=36 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0`.

On `docker-runtime-lv3`, `windmill-windmill_worker-1` was attached to both `windmill_default` and `openbao_default`, exposed `LV3_OPERATOR_MANAGER_SURFACE=windmill` and `LV3_OPENBAO_URL=http://lv3-openbao:8201`, resolved `lv3-openbao` to `172.20.0.2`, and returned an initialized and unsealed OpenBao health payload from `curl http://lv3-openbao:8201/v1/sys/health`.

`GET /api/version` returned `CE v1.662.0`, `GET /api/users/whoami` returned `superadmin_secret@windmill.dev`, and schedule `f/lv3/quarterly_access_review_every_monday_0900` remained enabled with cron `0 0 9 * * 1` in timezone `Europe/Bucharest`.

Windmill round-trip `codex-mainline-0108-raw-20260327t1200z` completed successfully: onboarding at `2026-03-27T12:00:31Z`, Keycloak user `b083aa43-0c93-4199-98d0-dfa891896f06`, OpenBao entity `3a3bfd44-fdc6-f879-fd02-c8ecffd9b32b`, active inventory showing Keycloak `active`, OpenBao `active`, and roster status `active`, offboarding at `2026-03-27T12:00:32Z`, and final inventory showing Keycloak `disabled`, OpenBao `disabled`, and roster status `inactive`.

notes: This successful 2026-03-27 replay supersedes the earlier 2026-03-26 branch-local receipt for ADR 0108; the worker runtime and operator lifecycle are now verified from the latest mainline replay.

Optional integrations remained non-blocking in the verified live path: step-ca register and revoke stayed skipped, Tailscale invite and removal stayed skipped or unavailable, and Mattermost notifications stayed skipped when their runtime environment variables were absent.
The first mainline release that records this verified live state is repository version 0.177.8 with platform version 0.130.29.
